title: DevSwing Manifest
description: Configuration manifest for a DevSwing playground (codeswing.json).

scripts.description: List of script library URLs or cdnjs package names to inject before the swing's script.

styles.description: List of stylesheet URLs or cdnjs package names to inject before the swing's styles.

layout.description: Override the default editor layout for this swing.

showConsole.description: Automatically show the console output panel when this swing opens.

template.description: Mark this swing as a template so it appears in the New Swing gallery.

scriptType.description: Force the script tag type for the swing's main script.

readmeBehavior.description: Control how the swing's README is displayed in the preview.

tutorial.description: Title of the tutorial this swing belongs to.

themePreview.description: Apply the VS Code editor theme colors to the preview pane.

description.description: Short description of what this swing demonstrates.

author.description: Name or handle of the swing's author.

tags.description: Keywords for categorising or filtering this swing.

fileName.description: Name of the file the learner should edit.

prompt.description: Prompt text shown to the learner.

completionMessage.description: Message shown when the tutorial is completed.
